server/src/image_tool/png/codec.py :: _paeth
def _paeth(left: int, up: int, upper_left: int) -> int:
    initial = left + up - upper_left
    left_distance = abs(initial - left)
    up_distance = abs(initial - up)
    upper_left_distance = abs(initial - upper_left)
    if left_distance <= up_distance and left_distance <= upper_left_distance:
        return left
    if up_distance <= upper_left_distance:
        return up
    return upper_left

def decode_png(data: bytes) -> Raster:
    if data[:8] != b"\x89PNG\r\n\x1a\n":
        raise ValueError("Not a PNG image.")

    index = 8
    width = 0
    height = 0
    bit_depth = 0
    color_type = 0
    compressed = bytearray()

    while index < len(data):
        length = struct.unpack_from(">I", data, index)[0]
        chunk_type = data[index + 4 : index + 8]
        chunk_data = data[index + 8 : index + 8 + length]
        index += 12 + length

        if chunk_type == b"IHDR":
            width, height, bit_depth, color_type, _, _, _ = struct.unpack(">IIBBBBB", chunk_data)
        elif chunk_type == b"IDAT":
            compressed.extend(chunk_data)
        elif chunk_type == b"IEND":
            break

    if bit_depth != 8 or color_type not in (2, 6):
        raise ValueError("Only 8-bit RGB or RGBA PNG images are supported.")

    channels = 3 if color_type == 2 else 4
    bpp = channels
    stride = width * channels
    raw = zlib.decompress(bytes(compressed))
    pixels = bytearray(width * height * channels)
    previous = None
    offset = 0
    for row in range(height):
        filter_type = raw[offset]
        scanline = raw[offset + 1 : offset + 1 + stride]

def encode_png(raster: Raster, compression_level: int = 9) -> bytes:
    if raster.channels not in (3, 4):
        raster = raster.to_rgb()

    color_type = 2 if raster.channels == 3 else 6
    stride = raster.width * raster.channels
    raw = bytearray()
    previous = None
    for row in range(raster.height):
        row_bytes = bytes(raster.data[row * stride : (row + 1) * stride])
        filter_type, filtered = _filter_scanline(row_bytes, previous, raster.channels)
        raw.append(filter_type)
        raw.extend(filtered)
        previous = row_bytes

    compressed = zlib.compress(bytes(raw), level=compression_level)
    ihdr = struct.pack(
        ">IIBBBBB",
        raster.width,
        raster.height,
        8,
        color_type,
        0,
        0,
        0,
    )

    def chunk(chunk_type: bytes, payload: bytes) -> bytes:
        crc = zlib.crc32(chunk_type)
        crc = zlib.crc32(payload, crc) & 0xFFFFFFFF
        return struct.pack(">I", len(payload)) + chunk_type + payload + struct.pack(">I", crc)
